message:
fix(storage): consistent PVC counts + disable non-functional drilldown clicks (#6809, #6810) (#6883)

Storage page (Storage.tsx) used usePVCs() while dashboard cards used
useCachedPVCs(), causing inconsistent PVC counts during partial refresh.
Switched Storage.tsx to useCachedPVCs() for a single source of truth.

PVC rows appeared clickable (cursor-pointer, onClick, ChevronRight) but
no PVC drilldown view exists in DrillDownModal, so clicks did nothing.
Removed click handlers and pointer styling from PVC rows in PVCStatus,
StorageOverview, and PVCListModal. Added "PVC drilldown not available"
tooltip where appropriate.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
